---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to add.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 📋 Proposed Solution
How would you implement this feature? What would it look like?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other solutions or approaches did you consider?

## 📝 Implementation Details (Optional)
If you have ideas about how to code this:
- Which files need to be modified?
- What functions or components are needed?
- Any technical considerations?

## 📸 Mockups or Examples (Optional)
Add screenshots, drawings, or links to similar features.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What needs to be true for this feature to be complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other information, links, or context about the feature.

## 🆘 For Beginners
New to contributing?
- Check [BEGINNER_GUIDE.md](../../BEGINNER_GUIDE.md) to get started
- Ask Bob: "Bob, how would I implement [feature]?"
- Feel free to ask questions in the comments!
